next_steps: Immediate ECG to evaluate rhythm and heart rate
Serum digoxin level and electrolyte panel (specifically potassium, magnesium, calcium)
Urgent ICD interrogation to evaluate for arrhythmias and device function
Point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to assess wall motion and mitral valve function
Fluid resuscitation for hypotension/hypoperfusion if clinically indicated
Immediate transfer to an emergency department for telemetry monitoring
